====Pokémon====
This listing is of Drayden's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in the [[Pokémon animated series]]:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Drayden
|pkmn=Haxorus
|type1=Dragon
|img=Drayden Haxorus.png
|epnum=BW033
|epname=Iris and Excadrill Against the Dragon Buster!
|vajp=Kenta Miyake
|vaen=Tom Wayland
|desc=Drayden's {{p|Haxorus}} appeared in {{an|Iris}}'s flashback, where it battled her {{TP|Iris|Excadrill}} and won. Excadrill's loss to Haxorus was what caused him to [[Obedience|disobey]] Iris for many years.

It reappeared in ''[[BW101|Drayden Versus Iris: Past, Present, and Future!]]'', where it battled Excadrill again. Both Pokémon fought a tough battle, which ended in a tie after a clash of {{m|Drill Run}} and Giga Impact.

Haxorus appeared in ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]'' during a flashback of Drayden's battle against Iris.

Haxorus's known moves are {{m|Rock Smash}} and {{m|Giga Impact}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Drayden
|pkmn=Druddigon
|type1=Dragon
|img=Drayden Druddigon.png
|epnum=BW101
|epname=Drayden Versus Iris: Past, Present, and Future!
|vajp=Kenta Miyake
|vaen=Marc Thompson
|desc=Drayden used {{p|Druddigon}} as his second in his {{pkmn|battle}} against {{an|Iris}}. It battled [[Iris's Dragonite]], and after a very tough match, it finally emerged victorious with its Dragon Tail attack.

Druddigon was shown to be very strong, being able to withstand Dragonite's [[Type#Type effectiveness|supereffective]] {{m|Ice Beam}} and intercept it in the middle of a {{m|Dragon Rush}}.

Druddigon's known moves are {{m|Dragon Claw}}, {{m|Flash Cannon}}, {{m|Double Team}}, and {{m|Dragon Tail}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Drayden
|pkmn=Axew
|type1=Dragon
|img=Drayden Axew.png
|epnum=JN065
|epname=Thrash of the Titans!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Axew}} watched the battle between Iris and Ash alongside Drayden. In ''[[JN117|The Fiery Road to Mastership!]]'', Axew was shown watching Iris's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Cynthia}} alongside its Trainer.

None of Axew's moves are known.}}
